title: SolarEdge Stock Jumps 17% as Tax-Credit Deadline Puts SEDG Turnaround Back on Watch
text: SolarEdge Stock Recovery and Tax Credit Impact. Stock Rally: SolarEdge shares surged 17% as investors regained confidence in the company's recovery story, driven by positive earnings results and an approaching tax credit deadline that could spur demand. Tax Credit Catalyst: The U.S. Investment Tax Credit (ITC) extension and related federal tax incentives for solar installations became a significant driver for demand expectations. Earnings Impact: The company reported better-than-expected financial results that beat analyst estimates, providing evidence of operational improvement. Turnaround Narrative: The combination of cost reductions, margin expansion, and improving cash flow generation put the company back on investors' radars as a potential turnaround play. Market Sentiment Shift: After months of bearish sentiment, SEDG benefited from a shift in perception as evidence mounted that the worst of the inventory correction and market downturn was behind the company.
